BPL Auction After 12 Years: A New Era Begins

BPL Auction After 12 Years: A New Era Begins

For the first time in 12 years, the Bangladesh Premier League (BPL) has conducted a full-scale player auction. Franchise representatives, star players, and fans celebrated what many are calling the beginning of a new era for the league.
